title: PermissionRequestFrame
description: backend → TUI: a worker raises a permission request. Direction: backend → TUI. The TUI MUST render the permission-gauntlet modal (lifted from Claude Code) and block input until a permission_response is emitted (FR-045, FR-046).

request_id.description: ULID; round-trips in the matching permission_response frame.

description_ko.description: Korean-language description shown to the citizen.

description_en.description: English-language description shown alongside the Korean one.
